positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a futuristic cityscape seen through stylized natural elements. The scene features glowing bioluminescent flora, ancient monolithic structures, and sleek, suspended transportation lines weaving through a dense canopy of tropical jungle. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and vibrant Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e), rendered in high-contrast, saturated jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and electric gold). The composition is highly symmetrical, with the main subject centered and framed by arcing natural and architectural elements, creating a strong, recognizable silhouette suitable for a t-shirt print. Dramatic rim lighting highlights the edges of the foliage and buildings. Graphic novel quality, digital painting, highly detailed vector illustration, 8k.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, graffiti, abstract, photorealism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, dull colors, messy, noise
